ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the financial data belongs to */,
  "bank_balance" TEXT /* Bank balance of the individual */,
  "mixed_nums" INTEGER /* Mixed numeric data (e.g., account numbers, transaction IDs) */,
  "income" TEXT /* Annual income of the individual */,
  "expenses" TEXT /* Monthly expenses of the individual */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the individual */,
  "debt" TEXT /* Total debt of the individual */,
  "investment" TEXT /* Total investment of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the financial record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the financial record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the age belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the age record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the age record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ages_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_financial_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_id")
)
